name: Pulse_Mech

infobox.Systems: Repulse(Science)EffectPush all adjacent tiles.Upgrade IShield Self ()Creates a personal Shield when used.Upgrade IIShield Friendly ()Shield adjacent ally or Building.

sections.Team: The mech is available as part of theRusting Hulkssquad.
sections.Strategy:
The Pulse Mech's main purpose in the Rusting Hulks is to support its teammates with displacement and protection with shields, and will require Reactor Cores in order to get maximum value with its utility.
TheShield Selfupgrade for Repulse is a good early unlock with the first reactor core, as the Pulse Mech starts with good durability and movement to not require upgrades on those immediately. The Pulse Mech activating ashieldon itself whenever it uses Repulse, even if there's no targets adjacent to push, can be used to block enemyspawnswithout taking damage, and also let it survive an otherwise fatal attacks from an Alpha enemy in the early game.
Shields are also useful in conjunction with a freezing weapon (such asIce Generator) to avoid being frozen; this can become more advantageous for the entire squad when theShield Friendlyupgrade is unlocked. The Shield Friendly upgrade will also protect adjacentbuildingswith a shield, so it's generally worth getting after the 1st island, as this upgrade can also allow the Pulse Mech to neutralize enemy attacks (such as those from artillery enemies) that would otherwise be out of its range to push.
To get the most out of the multi-push, pilots that offer mobility and positioning benefits are recommended to find for the Pulse Mech.

The Pulse Mech's main purpose in the Rusting Hulks is to support its teammates with displacement and protection with shields, and will require Reactor Cores in order to get maximum value with its utility.
The
Shield Self
upgrade for Repulse is a good early unlock with the first reactor core, as the Pulse Mech starts with good durability and movement to not require upgrades on those immediately. The Pulse Mech activating a
shield
on itself whenever it uses Repulse, even if there's no targets adjacent to push, can be used to block enemy
spawns
without taking damage, and also let it survive an otherwise fatal attacks from an Alpha enemy in the early game.
Shields are also useful in conjunction with a freezing weapon (such as
Ice Generator
) to avoid being frozen; this can become more advantageous for the entire squad when the
Shield Friendly
upgrade is unlocked. The Shield Friendly upgrade will also protect adjacent
buildings
with a shield, so it's generally worth getting after the 1st island, as this upgrade can also allow the Pulse Mech to neutralize enemy attacks (such as those from artillery enemies) that would otherwise be out of its range to push.
To get the most out of the multi-push, pilots that offer mobility and positioning benefits are recommended to find for the Pulse Mech.
